_comment: Ad account management - export current filtered result.

keyword.description: Keyword filter. Empty string means no keyword filter.

appName.description: App filter. Empty string means all.

platform.description: Platform filter. Empty string means all.

adPlatform.description: Ad platform filter. Empty string means all.

status.description: Status filter. Empty string means all.

response._note: Binary file stream. Filename should come from Content-Disposition.

notes: Suggested export columns: status, appName, platform, adPlatform, managerAccount, adAccounts, credential, tokenConfigured.
If no rows match, still return a valid file with header only.

triggers.detail: Called when the top export button is clicked.

interaction.defaultSelection: Use the current page keyword and filters.
